speaker: Argo
text: "Well, he’s a student now, so how about Lord Baten..."

speaker: Baten
text: "Thanks for invitin' me, Argo."

speaker: Argo
text: "No, no. Thank you for coming."

speaker: Baten
text: "Most people avoid me... I was thrilled when you asked!"

speaker: Argo
text: "Lord Scheat said the same thing."

speaker: Baten
text: "Well, we are dragons. That's just how it is."

speaker: Baten
text: "But on the other hand, ain’t a lotta you students quiet?"

speaker: Argo
text: "Y-You think so?"

speaker: Baten
text: "Everyone's more lively in my country, you know? We all leave work early to sing and dance~."

speaker: Argo
text: "I doubt that..."

speaker: Baten
text: "It’s a school for rich kids, so I guess they're all too busy studyin'."

speaker: Argo
text: "That might be true, but maybe it’s just because you don’t know the well enough yet." *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: "What? I just gotta get to know 'em?'*

speaker: Argo
text: "Yeah. They’re all nice and friendly, you know." *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: “...I see! And here I was, worryin' about some stupid bullshit!"

speaker: Argo
text: "(*His attitude did a complete 180!*)"

speaker: Baten
text: "The kid taught me somethin'! I thought I’d lived long enough to know it all!" *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Professor Celio said something similar once... Is everyone older than me like that?" *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "...Now that I think about it, how old are you anyway? I can’t tell just by looking at you..."

speaker: Baten
text: "Ha! I ain’t sayin’."

speaker: Argo
text: "Aw... But I'm curious..."

speaker: Baten
text: "I'll at least say I’m much older than you."

speaker: Argo
text: "Well that's obvious..."
